summaryForNext: Backend: openspec, driven by /kbd-apply (one task/turn). 3 changes in dependency order; first pending: add-agent-governance-lint (G1+G4, the anchor). Per-change QA: artifact-refiner + separated security review (full on 1+2 startup/deny behavior; light on 3, validated by the Cedar validator) + a fail-safe-default/fail-closed test each; archive via --skip-specs. ZERO new deps (reuse admin_auth_posture pattern, pipeline route->provider resolution, record_delegate metric, Cedar write-time validator). Guardrail: federate any JWKS IdM, Ory reference, never an IdP. Sync progress.json then advance waypoint in SEPARATE commands (pipeline-enforce hook).
